  "inlineSchema": "generator client {\n  provider      = \"prisma-client-js\"\n  output        = \"../src/generated/prisma\"\n  binaryTargets = [\"native\", \"linux-musl-openssl-3.0.x\"]\n}\n\ndatasource db {\n  provider = \"postgresql\"\n  url      = env(\"DATABASE_URL\")\n}\n\n/// Admin user account for management panels\nmodel AdminUser {\n  id          String     @id @default(cuid())\n  sub         String     @unique @db.VarChar(100)\n  displayName String?    @map(\"display_name\") @db.VarChar(100)\n  avatarUrl   String?    @map(\"avatar_url\") @db.VarChar(500)\n  tenantKey   String?    @map(\"tenant_key\") @db.VarChar(100)\n  unionId     String?    @unique @map(\"union_id\") @db.VarChar(100)\n  mobile      String?    @db.VarChar(50)\n  password    String     @db.VarChar(255)\n  userType    UserType   @default(FEISHU) @map(\"user_type\")\n  createdAt   DateTime   @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n  updatedAt   DateTime   @updatedAt @map(\"updated_at\")\n  auditLogs   AuditLog[]\n  userRoles   UserRole[]\n\n  @@map(\"admin_users\")\n}\n\n/// Role defines a set of permissions\nmodel Role {\n  id              String           @id @default(cuid())\n  name            String           @unique @db.VarChar(50)\n  description     String?          @db.VarChar(255)\n  createdAt       DateTime         @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n  updatedAt       DateTime         @updatedAt @map(\"updated_at\")\n  rolePermissions RolePermission[]\n  userRoles       UserRole[]\n\n  @@map(\"admin_roles\")\n}\n\n/// Permission represents a single capability/action\nmodel Permission {\n  id              String           @id @default(cuid())\n  key             String           @unique @db.VarChar(100)\n  description     String?          @db.VarChar(255)\n  createdAt       DateTime         @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n  updatedAt       DateTime         @updatedAt @map(\"updated_at\")\n  rolePermissions RolePermission[]\n\n  @@map(\"admin_permissions\")\n}\n\n/// Many-to-many relation between AdminUser and Role\nmodel UserRole {\n  id        String    @id @default(cuid())\n  userId    String    @map(\"user_id\")\n  roleId    String    @map(\"role_id\")\n  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n  role      Role      @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user      AdminUser @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([userId, roleId])\n  @@map(\"admin_user_roles\")\n}\n\n/// Many-to-many relation between Role and Permission\nmodel RolePermission {\n  id           String     @id @default(cuid())\n  roleId       String     @map(\"role_id\")\n  permissionId String     @map(\"permission_id\")\n  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n  permission   Permission @relation(fields: [permissionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  role         Role       @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([roleId, permissionId])\n  @@map(\"admin_role_permissions\")\n}\n\n/// Audit log for tracking RBAC changes\nmodel AuditLog {\n  id         String     @id @default(cuid())\n  userId     String?    @map(\"user_id\")\n  action     String     @db.VarChar(50)\n  targetType String?    @map(\"target_type\") @db.VarChar(50)\n  targetId   String?    @map(\"target_id\")\n  details    Json?\n  ipAddress  String?    @map(\"ip_address\") @db.VarChar(45)\n  userAgent  String?    @map(\"user_agent\") @db.VarChar(500)\n  createdAt  DateTime   @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n  user       AdminUser? @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([action])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n  @@map(\"admin_audit_logs\")\n}\n\nmodel ai_agent_cycle_task {\n  session_key   String?   @unique(map: \"ai_agent_cycle_task_session_key_uindex\") @db.VarChar\n  status        Int?\n  id            Int       @id(map: \"ai_agent_cycle_task_pk\") @default(autoincrement())\n  updated_at    DateTime? @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  task_run_time DateTime? @db.Timestamp(6)\n\n  @@index([task_run_time])\n}\n\nmodel ai_call_daily_report_push_record {\n  stat_date DateTime @id @db.Date\n  sent_at   DateTime @default(now()) @db.Timestamptz(6)\n}\n\nmodel ai_call_daily_stats {\n  stat_date              DateTime @db.Date\n  channel                String   @db.VarChar(100)\n  model_name             String   @db.VarChar(100)\n  total_calls            BigInt\n  total_success          BigInt\n  success_rate           Decimal  @db.Decimal(6, 4)\n  avg_duration_ms        Decimal? @db.Decimal\n  max_duration_ms        BigInt?\n  tp99_duration_ms       Decimal? @db.Decimal\n  created_at             DateTime @default(now()) @db.Timestamptz(6)\n  failed_top_extra       Json?\n  failed_top_extra_count BigInt?\n\n  @@id([stat_date, channel, model_name])\n}\n\nmodel ai_call_fail_rate_5m {\n  window_start DateTime  @db.Timestamptz(6)\n  channel      String    @db.VarChar(100)\n  model_name   String    @db.VarChar(100)\n  starts       Int\n  fails        Int\n  fail_rate    Decimal   @db.Decimal(6, 4)\n  created_at   DateTime? @default(now()) @db.Timestamptz(6)\n\n  @@id([window_start, channel, model_name])\n}\n\nmodel ai_call_fail_rate_alert {\n  id           BigInt   @id @default(autoincrement())\n  window_start DateTime @db.Timestamptz(6)\n  channel      String   @db.VarChar(100)\n  model_name   String   @db.VarChar(100)\n  fail_rate    Decimal  @db.Decimal(6, 4)\n  threshold    Decimal  @db.Decimal(6, 4)\n  sent_at      DateTime @default(now()) @db.Timestamptz(6)\n  webhook_resp Json?\n\n  @@unique([window_start, channel, model_name])\n}\n\n/// This table is a partition table and requires additional setup for migrations. Visit https://pris.ly/d/partition-tables for more info.\nmodel ai_call_record {\n  id                   BigInt         @default(autoincrement())\n  call_id              String         @db.Uuid\n  channel              String         @db.VarChar(100)\n  model_name           String         @db.VarChar(100)\n  status               ai_call_status\n  duration_ms          BigInt?\n  started_at           DateTime       @db.Timestamptz(6)\n  finished_at          DateTime?      @db.Timestamptz(6)\n  extra                Json?\n  fail_top_extra       Json?          @default(\"{}\")\n  fail_top_extra_count Int?           @default(0)\n\n  @@id([id, started_at], map: \"ai_call_record_pk\")\n  @@unique([call_id, started_at], map: \"ai_call_record_callid_uq\")\n}\n\n/// The underlying table does not contain a valid unique identifier and can therefore currently not be handled by Prisma Client.\nmodel ai_call_record_old {\n  id          BigInt\n  id_back     BigInt?\n  call_id     String         @db.Uuid\n  channel     String         @db.VarChar(100)\n  model_name  String         @db.VarChar(100)\n  status      ai_call_status\n  duration_ms BigInt?\n  started_at  DateTime       @db.Timestamptz(6)\n  finished_at DateTime?      @db.Timestamptz(6)\n  extra       Json?\n\n  @@ignore\n}\n\n/// This model or at least one of its fields has comments in the database, and requires an additional setup for migrations: Read more: https://pris.ly/d/database-comments\nmodel ai_chat_reply {\n  id           BigInt   @id @default(autoincrement())\n  user_id      Int\n  other_id     Int\n  chat_id      String?  @db.VarChar(100)\n  user_content String?\n  ai_reply     String?\n  status       String?  @db.VarChar(50)\n  ext_info     String?\n  created_at   DateTime @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  updated_at   DateTime @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n\n  @@unique([user_id, other_id], map: \"uniq_user_pair\")\n  @@index([chat_id], map: \"idx_ai_reply_chat_id\")\n  @@index([user_id], map: \"idx_ai_reply_user_id\")\n}\n\nmodel ai_chat_reply_stats {\n  id         BigInt   @id @default(autoincrement())\n  status     String?  @db.VarChar(50)\n  count      BigInt?\n  created_at DateTime @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  updated_at DateTime @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n}\n\nmodel available_cai_account {\n  id           Int       @id @default(autoincrement())\n  created_at   DateTime  @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  updated_at   DateTime? @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  email        String?   @db.VarChar\n  password     String?   @db.VarChar\n  cai_username String?   @db.VarChar\n  account_type Int       @default(1) @db.SmallInt\n  type_cursor  Int?\n}\n\nmodel avatar_desc_task {\n  id         BigInt   @id @default(autoincrement())\n  user_id    BigInt   @unique(map: \"uniq_user_id\")\n  avatar_md5 String?  @default(\"\") @db.VarChar\n  status     Int      @default(0)\n  created_at DateTime @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  update_at  DateTime @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n\n  @@index([avatar_md5], map: \"idx_avatar_md5\")\n}\n\n/// This model or at least one of its fields has comments in the database, and requires an additional setup for migrations: Read more: https://pris.ly/d/database-comments\nmodel avatar_generate_task {\n  external_task_id  String    @db.VarChar\n  external_platform String    @db.VarChar\n  id                Int       @id @default(autoincrement())\n  user_id           Int?\n  create_at         DateTime? @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  update_at         DateTime? @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  status            String?   @db.VarChar\n  result            String?\n\n  @@index([create_at], map: \"avatar_generate_task_create_at_index\")\n  @@index([external_task_id, external_platform], map: \"avatar_generate_task_external_task_id_external_platform_index\")\n  @@index([external_task_id], map: \"avatar_generate_task_external_task_id_index\")\n  @@index([status], map: \"avatar_generate_task_status_index\")\n  @@index([user_id], map: \"avatar_generate_task_user_id_index\")\n}\n\nmodel bot_stats {\n  bot_id                 String @id @db.VarChar\n  conversation_count     Int    @default(0)\n  msg_received_count     BigInt @default(0)\n  avg_msg_received_count Int    @default(0)\n\n  @@index([avg_msg_received_count(sort: Desc)], map: \"idx_bot_stats_avg_msg_rsv_count\")\n}\n\nmodel bot_tag {\n  id            Int     @id @default(autoincrement())\n  name          String? @unique(map: \"bot_tag_name_index\") @db.VarChar\n  sort_key      Int?\n  is_for_review Boolean @default(false)\n}\n\nmodel bot_tran_text {\n  id       Int     @id(map: \"bot_tran_text_pk\") @default(autoincrement())\n  ori_text String? @db.VarChar\n  es       String? @db.VarChar\n  pt       String? @db.VarChar\n\n  @@index([ori_text], map: \"bot_tran_text_ori_text_index\")\n}\n\n/// This table is a partition table and requires additional setup for migrations. Visit https://pris.ly/d/partition-tables for more info.\nmodel bot_warehouse_v2 {\n  external_id                   String                   @db.VarChar\n  title                         String                   @default(\"\") @db.VarChar\n  greeting                      String                   @default(\"\") @db.VarChar\n  avatar_file_name              String                   @default(\"\") @db.VarChar\n  visibility                    Int                      @default(1)\n  participant__name             String?                  @default(\"\") @db.VarChar\n  participant__num_interactions search_score                  Float                    @default(0)\n  avatar_ori_url                String                   @default(\"\") @db.VarChar\n  category                      String @default(now()) @db.Timestamptz(6)\n  updated_at   DateTime? @default(now()) @db.Timestamptz(6)\n  deleted_at   DateTime? @db.Timestamptz(6)\n\n  @@index([from_user_id], map: \"idx_video_call_transcripts_from_user_id\")\n  @@index([message_id], map: \"idx_video_call_transcripts_message_id\")\n  @@index([to_user_id], map: \"idx_video_call_transcripts_to_user_id\")\n}\n\n/// This model or at least one of its fields has comments in the database, and requires an additional setup for migrations: Read more: https://pris.ly/d/database-comments\nmodel video_match_pair {\n  id             BigInt    @id @default(autoincrement())\n  created_at     DateTime  @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  updated_at     DateTime  @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  user_id        Int\n  target_user_id Int\n  expire_at      DateTime? @db.Timestamp(6)\n\n  @@unique([user_id, target_user_id], map: \"video_match_pair_user_id_target_user_id_unique_idx\")\n  @@index([expire_at])\n}\n\nmodel video_test_history {\n  id         BigInt   @id @default(autoincrement())\n  created_at DateTime @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  video_id   Int\n  user_id    Int\n  order_id   Int      @default(0)\n  source     String?  @db.VarChar(50)\n  video_url  String?  @db.VarChar(255)\n  pass       Boolean  @default(true)\n\n  @@index([order_id], map: \"idx_order_id\")\n  @@index([created_at, user_id], map: \"idx_userid_create_ate\")\n}\n\nmodel watch_ads_record {\n  id               BigInt   @id @default(autoincrement())\n  user_id          Int\n  ads_id           String?  @db.VarChar\n  ads_duration     BigInt?\n  ads_type         Int?\n  created_at       DateTime @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  watch_local_date String?  @db.VarChar\n\n  @@index([user_id], map: \"watch_ads_record_user_id_index\")\n  @@index([watch_local_date], map: \"watch_ads_record_watch_local_date_index\")\n}\n\n/// This model or at least one of its fields has comments in the database, and requires an additional setup for migrations: Read more: https://pris.ly/d/database-comments\nmodel love_ring_pair {\n  id             BigInt    @id @default(autoincrement())\n  created_at     DateTime  @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  updated_at     DateTime  @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  user_id        Int\n  target_user_id Int\n  expire_at      DateTime? @db.Timestamp(6)\n\n  @@unique([user_id, target_user_id], map: \"love_ring_pair_user_id_target_user_id_unique_idx\")\n  @@index([expire_at])\n}\n\nmodel pwa_data_operation_log {\n  id          BigInt   @id @default(autoincrement())\n  user_id     Int\n  operator    String   @default(\"\") @db.VarChar(20)\n  create_time DateTime @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  content     String?  @db.VarChar\n}\n\nmodel pwa_recall_pair {\n  id             BigInt    @id @default(autoincrement())\n  created_at     DateTime  @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  updated_at     DateTime  @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n  user_id        Int\n  target_user_id Int\n  expire_at      DateTime? @db.Timestamp(6)\n}\n\n/// This model or at least one of its fields has comments in the database, and requires an additional setup for migrations: Read more: https://pris.ly/d/database-comments\nmodel pwa_stock_record {\n  id           BigInt    @id @default(autoincrement())\n  pwa_user_id  Int\n  user_id      Int\n  channel_type String    @db.VarChar(20)\n  amount       Int\n  created_at   DateTime? @default(now()) @db.Timestamptz(6)\n\n  @@index([pwa_user_id, user_id, channel_type], map: \"idx_pwa_user_id_user_id_channel_type\")\n  @@index([user_id], map: \"idx_user_id_1\")\n}\n\n/// This table is a partition table and requires additional setup for migrations. Visit https://pris.ly/d/partition-tables for more info.\nmodel user_event_record {\n  id             BigInt   @default(autoincrement())\n  user_id        Int\n  target_user_id Int\n  user_event     Int\n  created_at     DateTime @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n\n  @@id([id, created_at], map: \"user_event_record_pk\")\n  @@index([created_at], map: \"idx_uer_created_at\")\n  @@index([target_user_id], map: \"idx_uer_target_user_id\")\n  @@index([user_id], map: \"idx_uer_user_id\")\n  @@index([user_event], map: \"idx_user_event\")\n}\n\nmodel user_expand_info {\n  id           BigInt   @id @default(autoincrement())\n  user_id      Int\n  stage        String?  @db.VarChar\n  score_weight Decimal? @default(1) @db.Decimal(10, 2)\n}\n\nmodel image_upload_record {\n  id         BigInt    @id @default(autoincrement())\n  md5        String    @unique @db.VarChar(32)\n  base64     String\n  image_url  String\n  created_at DateTime? @default(now()) @db.Timestamp(6)\n}\n\nenum UserType {\n  SYSTEM\n  FEISHU\n}\n\nenum ai_call_status {\n  STARTED\n  SUCCESS\n  FAILED\n  TIMEOUT\n}\n\nenum bot_from_type {\n  USER\n  CAI\n  USER_FAKE\n  DIGITAL_HUMAN\n}\n\nenum post_interact_type {\n  UNSPECIFIED\n  MALE_LIKE\n  FEMALE_LIKE\n  NON_BINARY_LIKE\n  MALE_COMMENT\n  FEMALE_COMMENT\n  NON_BINARY_COMMENT\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// Union Ops — AI 工会运营系统\n// ============================================================\n\nenum UnionUserStatus {\n  pending_device\n  pending_contact\n  in_conversation\n  paused\n  silent\n  converted\n  opted_out\n  invalid_number\n  rejected\n  dead\n}\n\nenum UnionUserSource {\n  tiktok\n  facebook\n  manual\n  other\n}\n\nenum UnionPhase {\n  activation\n  retention\n  conversion\n  recall\n}\n\nenum UnionMsgDirection {\n  inbound\n  outbound\n}\n\nenum UnionMsgStatus {\n  pending\n  sent\n  delivered\n  failed\n}\n\nenum UnionTemplateStatus {\n  draft\n  reviewing\n  published\n  archived\n}\n\nenum UnionTriggerType {\n  user_reply\n  scheduled_followup\n  manual\n  initial_contact\n}\n\nenum UnionAlertLevel {\n  critical\n  warning\n  info\n}\n\nenum UnionDecisionAction {\n  send_now\n  schedule_followup\n  mark_converted\n  mark_dead\n  escalate_to_human\n}\n\nenum UnionDeviceStatus {\n  online\n  offline\n  maintenance\n}\n\n/// Union user pool — each row is a female user acquired from ads\nmodel UnionUser {\n  id            String          @id @default(cuid())\n  phone         String          @unique @db.VarChar(20)\n  source        UnionUserSource @default(other)\n  status        UnionUserStatus @default(pending_device)\n  phase         UnionPhase      @default(activation)\n  deviceId      String?         @map(\"device_id\")\n  abGroup       String?         @map(\"ab_group\") @db.VarChar(50)\n  refCode       String?         @unique @map(\"ref_code\") @db.VarChar(8)\n  qualityScore  Float?          @default(0) @map(\"quality_score\")\n  isTest        Boolean         @default(false) @map(\"is_test\")\n  sourceDetail  Json?           @map(\"source_detail\")\n  zipCode       String?         @map(\"zip_code\") @db.VarChar(10)\n  lastContactAt DateTime?       @map(\"last_contact_at\")\n  convertedAt   DateTime?       @map(\"converted_at\")\n  createdAt     DateTime        @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n  updatedAt     DateTime        @updatedAt @map(\"updated_at\")\n\n  device        UnionDevice?        @relation(fields: [deviceId], references: [id])\n  conversations UnionConversation[]\n  statusLogs    UnionStatusLog[]\n  tags          UnionUserTag[]\n  messages      UnionMessage[]\n  decisionLogs  UnionDecisionLog[]\n\n  @@index([status])\n  @@index([phase])\n  @@index([deviceId])\n  @@index([source])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n  @@map(\"union_users\")\n}\n\n/// Conversation messages between AI/operator and union user\nmodel UnionConversation {\n  id         String            @id @default(cuid())\n  userId     String            @map(\"user_id\")\n  direction  UnionMsgDirection\n  content    String\n  deviceId   String?           @map(\"device_id\")\n  decisionId String?           @map(\"decision_id\")\n  sendStatus UnionMsgStatus    @default(pending) @map(\"send_status\")\n  metadata   Json?\n  createdAt  DateTime          @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n\n  user   UnionUser           @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])\n  traces UnionMessageTrace[]\n\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n  @@map(\"union_conversations\")\n}\n\n/// Status transition audit log\nmodel UnionStatusLog {\n  id         String          @id @default(cuid())\n  userId     String          @map(\"user_id\")\n  fromStatus UnionUserStatus @map(\"from_status\")\n  toStatus   UnionUserStatus @map(\"to_status\")\n  trigger    String          @db.VarChar(50)\n  operatorId String?         @map(\"operator_id\")\n  note       String?\n  createdAt  DateTime        @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n\n  user UnionUser @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n  @@map(\"union_status_logs\")\n}\n\n/// User tags (system-generated or manual)\nmodel UnionUserTag {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  userId    String   @map(\"user_id\")\n  tagName   String   @map(\"tag_name\") @db.VarChar(50)\n  tagType   String   @default(\"system\") @map(\"tag_type\") @db.VarChar(20)\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n\n  user UnionUser @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])\n\n  @@unique([userId, tagName])\n  @@index([tagName])\n  @@map(\"union_user_tags\")\n}\n\n/// Script templates organized by phase → scene → version\nmodel UnionTemplate {\n  id           String              @id @default(cuid())\n  phase        UnionPhase\n  scene        String              @db.VarChar(50)\n  versionCode  String              @map(\"version_code\") @db.VarChar(20)\n  status       UnionTemplateStatus @default(draft)\n  content      String\n  variables    Json?\n  dialogueTree Json?               @map(\"dialogue_tree\")\n  creatorId    String?             @map(\"creator_id\")\n  reviewerId   String?             @map(\"reviewer_id\")\n  reviewNote   String?             @map(\"review_note\")\n  publishedAt  DateTime?           @map(\"published_at\")\n  createdAt    DateTime            @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n  updatedAt    DateTime            @updatedAt @map(\"updated_at\")\n\n  @@unique([phase, scene, versionCode])\n  @@index([status])\n  @@map(\"union_templates\")\n}\n\n/// AB test experiments\nmodel UnionExperiment {\n  id             String     @id @default(cuid())\n  name           String     @db.VarChar(100)\n  phase          UnionPhase\n  scene          String     @db.VarChar(50)\n  variants       Json\n  allocationRule Json       @map(\"allocation_rule\")\n  status         String     @default(\"draft\") @db.VarChar(20)\n  startedAt      DateTime?  @map(\"started_at\")\n  endedAt        DateTime?  @map(\"ended_at\")\n  createdAt      DateTime   @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n  updatedAt      DateTime   @updatedAt @map(\"updated_at\")\n\n  @@map(\"union_experiments\")\n}\n\n/// Physical phone devices used for SMS\nmodel UnionDevice {\n  id                 String            @id @default(cuid())\n  deviceId           String            @unique @map(\"device_id\") @db.VarChar(100)\n  phoneNumber        String            @map(\"phone_number\") @db.VarChar(20)\n  status             UnionDeviceStatus @default(offline)\n  dailyLimit         Int               @default(200) @map(\"daily_limit\")\n  todaySentCount     Int               @default(0) @map(\"today_sent_count\")\n  assignedUsersCount Int               @default(0) @map(\"assigned_users_count\")\n  lastHeartbeatAt    DateTime?         @map(\"last_heartbeat_at\")\n  metadata           Json?\n  createdAt          DateTime          @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n  updatedAt          DateTime          @updatedAt @map(\"updated_at\")\n\n  users    UnionUser[]\n  messages UnionMessage[]\n\n  @@index([status])\n  @@map(\"union_devices\")\n}\n\n/// WebSocket communication log per device (raw frames, excludes heartbeat)\nmodel UnionDeviceLog {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  deviceId  String   @map(\"device_id\") @db.VarChar(100)\n  direction String   @db.VarChar(20) // \"inbound\" | \"outbound\"\n  frameType String   @map(\"frame_type\") @db.VarChar(50)\n  payload   Json\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n\n  @@index([deviceId, createdAt])\n  @@map(\"union_device_logs\")\n}\n\n/// Message queue for reliable delivery\nmodel UnionMessage {\n  id          String         @id @default(cuid())\n  userId      String         @map(\"user_id\")\n  deviceId    String?        @map(\"device_id\")\n  content     String\n  priority    Int            @default(0)\n  sendStatus  UnionMsgStatus @default(pending) @map(\"send_status\")\n  retryCount  Int            @default(0) @map(\"retry_count\")\n  scheduledAt DateTime?      @map(\"scheduled_at\")\n  sentAt      DateTime?      @map(\"sent_at\")\n  failReason  String?        @map(\"fail_reason\")\n  createdAt   DateTime       @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n  updatedAt   DateTime       @updatedAt @map(\"updated_at\")\n\n  user   UnionUser           @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])\n  device UnionDevice?        @relation(fields: [deviceId], references: [id])\n  traces UnionMessageTrace[]\n\n  @@index([sendStatus])\n  @@index([scheduledAt])\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@map(\"union_messages\")\n}\n\n/// Message trace log - tracks message lifecycle across the entire pipeline\n/// Message trace log - tracks message lifecycle across the entire pipeline\nmodel UnionMessageTrace {\n  id             String   @id @default(cuid())\n  messageId      String?  @map(\"message_id\")\n  conversationId String?  @map(\"conversation_id\")\n  stage          String   @db.VarChar(50)\n  status         String   @db.VarChar(20)\n  latencyMs      Int?     @map(\"latency_ms\")\n  metadata       Json?\n  createdAt      DateTime @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n\n  message      UnionMessage?      @relation(fields: [messageId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  conversation UnionConversation? @relation(fields: [conversationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@index([messageId])\n  @@index([conversationId])\n  @@index([stage])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n  @@map(\"union_message_traces\")\n}\n\n/// Brain engine decision log\nmodel UnionDecisionLog {\n  id           String              @id @default(cuid())\n  userId       String              @map(\"user_id\")\n  triggerType  UnionTriggerType    @map(\"trigger_type\")\n  modelUsed    String?             @map(\"model_used\") @db.VarChar(50)\n  confidence   Float?\n  action       UnionDecisionAction\n  replyText    String?             @map(\"reply_text\")\n  reasoning    String?\n  promptTokens Int?                @map(\"prompt_tokens\")\n  outputTokens Int?                @map(\"output_tokens\")\n  latencyMs    Int?                @map(\"latency_ms\")\n  rawInput     Json?               @map(\"raw_input\")\n  rawOutput    Json?               @map(\"raw_output\")\n  createdAt    DateTime            @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n\n  user UnionUser @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([action])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n  @@map(\"union_decision_logs\")\n}\n\n/// Prompt version management (4-layer structure)\nmodel UnionPromptVersion {\n  id        String      @id @default(cuid())\n  layer     String      @db.VarChar(30)\n  phase     UnionPhase?\n  scene     String?     @db.VarChar(50)\n  content   String\n  version   Int         @default(1)\n  status    String      @default(\"draft\") @db.VarChar(20)\n  creatorId String?     @map(\"creator_id\")\n  createdAt DateTime    @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n  updatedAt DateTime    @updatedAt @map(\"updated_at\")\n\n  @@unique([layer, phase, scene, version])\n  @@map(\"union_prompt_versions\")\n}\n\n/// AI model configuration with priority-based fallback\nmodel UnionModelConfig {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  displayName String   @map(\"display_name\") @db.VarChar(100)\n  modelName   String   @map(\"model_name\") @db.VarChar(50)\n  provider    String   @db.VarChar(30)\n  priority    Int      @default(0)\n  apiKey      String   @map(\"api_key\") @db.VarChar(500)\n  endpoint    String?  @db.VarChar(500)\n  params      Json?\n  enabled     Boolean  @default(true)\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt @map(\"updated_at\")\n\n  @@unique([displayName])\n  @@map(\"union_model_configs\")\n}\n\n/// Alert rules for monitoring\nmodel UnionAlertRule {\n  id             String          @id @default(cuid())\n  name           String          @db.VarChar(100)\n  condition      String          @db.VarChar(200)\n  threshold      Float\n  level          UnionAlertLevel @default(warning)\n  enabled        Boolean         @default(true)\n  silenceMinutes Int             @default(30) @map(\"silence_minutes\")\n  createdAt      DateTime        @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n  updatedAt      DateTime        @updatedAt @map(\"updated_at\")\n\n  alerts UnionAlertLog[]\n\n  @@map(\"union_alert_rules\")\n}\n\n/// Alert history\nmodel UnionAlertLog {\n  id         String          @id @default(cuid())\n  ruleId     String          @map(\"rule_id\")\n  level      UnionAlertLevel\n  message    String\n  resolvedAt DateTime?       @map(\"resolved_at\")\n  createdAt  DateTime        @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n\n  rule UnionAlertRule @relation(fields: [ruleId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([ruleId])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n  @@map(\"union_alert_logs\")\n}\n\n/// Import history log\nmodel UnionImportLog {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  operatorId String   @map(\"operator_id\")\n  filename   String   @db.VarChar(255)\n  total      Int      @default(0)\n  success    Int      @default(0)\n  failed     Int      @default(0)\n  errors     Json?\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n\n  @@index([createdAt])\n  @@map(\"union_import_logs\")\n}\n\n/// AI call log — 大模型调用记录（持久化统计）\nmodel UnionAiCallLog {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  source    String   @db.VarChar(30)\n  model     String   @db.VarChar(80)\n  success   Boolean\n  latencyMs Int      @map(\"latency_ms\")\n  error     String?\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map(\"created_at\")\n\n  @@index([createdAt])\n  @@index([success])\n  @@map(\"union_ai_call_logs\")\n}\n\n/// Global configuration (key-value), decoupled from templates\nmodel UnionGlobalConfig {\n  key       String   @id @db.VarChar(100)\n  value     String\n  label     String?  @db.VarChar(200)\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt @map(\"updated_at\")\n\n  @@map(\"union_global_config\")\n}\n",
  "inlineSchemaHash": "26ead9c916120515d75b765be6de0c0013ac2781d19c0e5d89d5f0bb87d4f762",
  "copyEngine": true
}
